title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Rising Conflict
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #9 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's a "paddle steamer" for four people!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I might put some weapons in it.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I love the way you think, frankly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hurry up and let me ride Merry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...!? huh? The hatch opened by itself!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No... no one was even near it.

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: rising conflict.
